title: Druids [More Magic Series]
description: Debuff and incapacitate your enemies with the power of nature!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- AzureLib Armor
- More Runes
- Spell Engine
- More Spell Attributes
- Dragonsteel

### Strongly recommended
- Better Combat - for proper weapon mechanics
- More Jewels - for jewels to boost your strengths
# ✨ Features
This mod one new playable class to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

### Druids Spell Book
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Druid spells, create the Druids Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table! 

### Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, druid equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dacd8acd80fe49f3950503d86101540a5ff58fe.png)

Druid: new 2 armor sets, Staves.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/druid/item_v3
